top_gap_prompt: Best way to connect LLMs to enterprise knowledge bases with advanced indexing techniques for a AI engineers building knowledge-intensive LLM and RAG applications team
category_long: data framework for LLM applications and RAG pipelines

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: LlamaIndex's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: LlamaIndex lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: LlamaIndex's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best way to connect LLMs to enterprise knowledge bases with advanced indexing techniques for a AI engineers building knowledge-intensive LLM and RAG applications team
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How can a AI Engineer or ML Lead building RAG applications build production RAG pipelines over custom private data sources more efficiently?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: AI tooling tools with native OpenAI integration
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.
